[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110010 3
1 11000001 3
2 10011001 4
3 10111010 5
4 11011110 6
5 00000010 1
6 00110010 3
7 01010101 4

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 10011010 4
34 43 00000010 1 match 5
45 54 00000010 1 match 5
56 65 00010000 1
67 76 01010001 3
70 07 10010000 2

02 20 10010000 2
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 00000010 1 match 5
35 53 00010010 2
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00010000 1
60 06 00010100 2
71 17 01000000 1

03 30 10010100 3
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 00110010 3 match 0 6
36 63 01010100 3
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 00010000 1
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 10011000 3

04 40 00000000 a
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 00010000 1
37 73 11011000 4
